name: Mission Control Chat
description: Webchat channel plugin that connects Mission Control dashboard to OpenClaw agents

mcServerUrl.description: Base URL of the MC server (e.g. http://localhost:18790)

contextPackUrl.description: Base URL of the Next.js Mission Control API used for /api/chat/context-pack (e.g. http://localhost:3000)

sharedSecret.description: Shared secret for authenticating webhook callbacks between gateway and MC server

allowFrom.description: Portal tokens or admin tokens allowed to send messages
